message.minecad.sketch_tool.no_plane: Set a sketch plane with the Plane tool first.
message.minecad.sketch_tool.axis_mismatc: Vertex must use the same %s coordinate: %s.
message.minecad.sketch_tool.raycast_miss: No active sketch plane under the cursor.
message.minecad.extrude_tool.changed_pla: Extrude selection does not match the active plane.
message.minecad.extrude_tool.no_selectio: Select a sketch face with the Select Tool first.
message.minecad.select_tool.no_face: Click inside a closed sketch face on the active plane.
message.minecad.debug_tool.no_body: No MineCad body found at that block.
tooltip.minecad.plane: Click a block face to set the sketch plane.
tooltip.minecad.sketch_tool: Click the active sketch plane to add polygon vertices.
tooltip.minecad.box_tool: Click two corners on the active sketch plane.
tooltip.minecad.circle_tool: Click center, then radius on the active sketch plane.
tooltip.minecad.select_tool: Right-click a sketch face to select it. Crouch + right-click to unselect.
tooltip.minecad.debug_tool: Use in air to print sketch geometry. Right-click an extrusion block to highlight its body.
